subcodes.first_line: O ye companions of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! The soul yearneth after its Beloved, and the heart hath grown weary of this world of dust and clay. The spirit is enraptured [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عبدالبهاء جان جویای جانانست و دل بیزار از عالم آب و گل روح منجذبست
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @love of God
